name: Academic
description: Awards related to academic excellence, high grades, and outstanding performance in coursework and examinations.

name: Technical
description: Recognition for software development, system design, programming, and other IT-related technical skills.

name: Research
description: Awards for contributions to research, publications, innovation, and advancements in technology or science.

name: Competition
description: Achievements in local or international competitions such as coding contests, hackathons, and tech challenges.

name: Sports
description: Awards earned in physical sports activities such as football, basketball, athletics, and other outdoor games.

name: E-Sports
description: Recognition in competitive video gaming, including tournaments, leagues, and organized gaming events.

name: Leadership
description: Awards for leadership roles, student organizations, team management, and initiative-taking within the college.

name: Industry
description: Recognition from industry partners, internships, collaborations, and real-world project contributions.

name: Community
description: Awards for social impact, volunteering, outreach programs, and contributions to the community.

name: Institutional
description: Awards given to the college as a whole for excellence in education, infrastructure, or reputation.

name: Special
description: Special recognitions that do not fall into standard categories, including honorary awards and unique achievements.
